protein_name: Implicated in the level of global muscle contraction and cardiac function. Phosphorylates a specific serine in the N-terminus of a myosin light chain. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. CAMK Ser/Thr protein kinase family. Heart and skeletal muscles. Increased expression in the apical tissue compared to the interventricular septal tissue. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
